embeds.title: тЮХ HD Picture Viewer тАФ TI-84 Plus CE
embeds.description:
View full-color HD images on a **TI-84 Plus CE** or **TI-84 Plus CE Python**.

**You'll need:** the calculator ┬╖ a Windows/Mac/Linux PC ┬╖ a USB cable.

fields.name: ЁЯУе Step 1 тАФ Download
fields.value:
- **[TI Connect CE](https://education.ti.com/en/products/computer-software/ti-connect-ce-sw)** тАФ the transfer software.
- **[CE C/C++ Libraries](https://github.com/CE-Programming/libraries/releases/tag/v13.0)** тАФ get `clibs.8xg`. *(ChromeOS: grab `clibs_separately_in_zip.zip` and extract.)*
- **[arTIfiCE Jailbreak](https://github.com/YvanTT/arTIfiCE/releases/tag/v2.1)** тАФ get `ARTIC84C.8xp` (needed on OS 5.5+ to run ASM programs).
- **[HD Picture Viewer](https://github.com/TheLastMillennial/HD-Picture-Viewer/releases)** тАФ get `HDPICV.8xp` (+ optional sample pics).
- *Optional* тАФ [Picture Converter (Win)](https://github.com/TheLastMillennial/HDPictureViewerConverter2/releases) or [web converter](https://taricorp.gitlab.io/hdpictureconverter-rs/) to convert your own images.

fields.name: ЁЯФМ Step 2 тАФ Connect
fields.value: Plug the calculator into your PC via USB, turn it on, and open **TI Connect CE** тАФ it should detect the calculator automatically.

fields.name: ЁЯУВ Step 3 тАФ Transfer Files
fields.value:
In TI Connect CE, open **Calculator Explorer**, then drag-and-drop each file onto the calculator:
1. `clibs.8xg` *(ChromeOS: send each extracted file individually)*
2. `ARTIC84C.8xp`
3. `HDPICV.8xp` (lands in archive memory)
4. *(Optional)* picture files тАФ usually `.8xv`

fields.name: ЁЯФУ Step 4 тАФ Jailbreak (OS 5.5+ only)
fields.value:
Check your OS: `[2nd]` + `[+]` (MEM) тЖТ `1: About`.

**OS 5.5 / 5.6 / 5.7 / 5.8:**
1. Disconnect from the PC.
2. Press `[prgm]` тЖТ select **ARTIC84C** тЖТ `[enter]`.
3. Follow the prompts. Re-run it after any calculator reset.

**OS 5.4 or earlier:** skip this тАФ ASM programs run natively.

fields.name: тЦ╢я╕П Step 5 тАФ Run It
fields.value:
**OS 5.5+:** run **ARTIC84C** first, then `[prgm]` тЖТ **HDPICV** тЖТ `[enter]`.
**OS 5.4 or earlier:** just `[prgm]` тЖТ **HDPICV** тЖТ `[enter]`.

fields.name: ЁЯОо Controls
fields.value:
**Menu:** `[Enter]` open ┬╖ `[тЖС]`/`[тЖУ]` browse ┬╖ `[Clear]` quit ┬╖ `[Mode]` help
**Fullscreen:** `[Clear]` back ┬╖ `[Y=]`/`[Graph]` prev/next ┬╖ arrows pan ┬╖ `[+]`/`[-]` zoom ┬╖ `[Zoom]` max zoom ┬╖ `[Window]` reset ┬╖ `[Del]` delete pic

footer.text: TI-84 Plus CE тАв HD Picture Viewer Guide
